{{Infobox concept
| name = soulspace
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

''See also: [[soulspace Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A soulspace is an internal spiritual dimension that a person can open upon reaching the peak of the [[Truegold]] stage and achieving complete control over their [[madra]]. Located at the center of an individual's [[spirit]], it can manifest as a dark void or be filled with light. The size and capacity of this space vary by individual; for instance, it may initially be small enough to hold only a single bean or a wisp of flame, but it can expand over time. A primary function of the soulspace is to serve as a storage area for various items, including [[constructs]], weapons, sacred instruments, and even living entities like contracted [[sacred beasts]] or spirits. Users can withdraw these objects from their soulspace into the physical world at will. The contents held within the space can exert a palpable sensation of power or spiritual weight, and some items may even react to the environment while stored inside.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A person can only carry one object at a time in their [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[soulspace]] can be used to hold simple [[constructs]] at the center of a person's [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can store objects in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Constructs can be stored in a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[sacred instrument{{!}}Sacred instruments]] must be carried in a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Items can be kept in [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Little Blue]] is inside [[Yerin]]'s [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Constructs can explode from a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] drew his bow into his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] can reach his [[spiritual perception]] into his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[soulspace{{!}}Soulspace]] is a place where items like hammers can be stored.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can produce items from his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
